title: Website Tech Stack Detector Input
description: Provide website URLs to detect technologies, frameworks, CMS, analytics tools, and more.

urls.title: Website URLs
urls.description: List of website URLs to analyze. Use the homepage URL for best results (e.g., https://example.com).

categories.title: Technology Categories to Detect
categories.description: Filter detection to specific technology categories. Leave empty to detect all 80+ technologies.

fetchTimeoutMs.title: Fetch Timeout (ms)
fetchTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for a website to load before timing out.
